programmes.show_description: Ian Huntley. The murder of 10-year-olds Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002 shocked the UK. Experts study media interviews of their killer, Ian Huntley, to expose his lies. S2, Ep1
Virginia Vertetis. When Patrick Gilhuley was shot dead by his partner in 2014, she claimed it was self-defense, but her ex-husbands provided evidence of her violent past. S1, Ep8
The Hand-Off. In 2018, 33-year-old Joshua Webb is shot in Beckley, West Virginia. Police unravel a web of lies and follow a trail of shocking security footage to find the culprit. S9, Ep7
Toying With Us. In 2013, 35-year-old assistant manager Larry Wells is murdered in his office. Police follow a trail of surveillance footage to track down the disguised killer. S9, Ep8

Camera Clues. Forensic photographers are often first at the scene of a crime, capturing vital clues on film; but what can these pictures reveal? S1, Ep5
Death Grip. Fingerprints are an indisputable, time-tested method of establishing someone's ID. New computerisation means identification can now take only minutes. S1, Ep12
A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep14
Bad Company. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep15
Arash Ghorbani-Zarin. Judge Rinder explores a shocking stabbing as a result of an 'honour killing'. Plus, the tragic story of a four-year-old who was a hit-and-run victim. S4, Ep7
Love and Dishonor. When teens Zainab and Ammar fall in love, their relationship is forbidden by her father - who will stop at nothing to ensure that his rules of honour are obeyed. S2, Ep8
Mystery In The Ozarks. On May 19th, 2022, Christopher Hoye suddenly leaves his Ozarks homestead and is gone without a trace. As weeks go by, there are more questions than answers. S11, Ep10
Eye In The Sky. When Christie Wilson disappears after a night out, CCTV cameras reveal her gambling with a mysterious man. Can this footage unlock the secrets of what happened? S3, Ep9
Ann Marie Anastasi. An unconventional marriage ends in tragedy after the husband moves his young lover into the family home and neglects his wife of 18-years and their children. S1, Ep9
Momma's Girl. Arthur Burney was a fun-loving, protective father and grandfather. But, one day he walks out on the family after falling in love with another woman. S4, Ep11
Have You Seen This Woman? A couple raise their children in an idyllic rural town. But, their quiet lives are turned upside down when two of the family are found brutally murdered. S5, Ep9
Frenzy. Retired preacher and coin collector, Billy Shuler, is reported missing by his wife. But, after five months the case goes cold - will the killer ever be brought to justice? S1, Ep4
Wesley Neailey/Katelyn Parker. An 11-year-old boy goes missing near his home in Newcastle. Plus, a vulnerable young woman puts her trust in the wrong man. S4, Ep8
We See You, Kelsey. A teenage girl disappears from a Kansas Mall. The only clue for detectives - the haunting final images of her on surveillance video. S1, Ep3
He Put Me In The Dog Cage. As Christy copes with her dad's death and her son's diagnosis, her childhood crush, Joel, comes to the rescue. But soon she must fight for her life. S10, Ep19
The Watcher. On a rare day off from work, Carrie and a friend embark on a well-deserved night out. But, an unexpected confrontation puts her on a dangerous collision course. S6, Ep12
Arash Ghorbani-Zarin. Judge Rinder explores a shocking stabbing as a result of an 'honour killing'. Plus, the tragic story of a four-year-old who was a hit-and-run victim. S4, Ep7
Kelly Cochran. Kelly and Jason Cochran formed a killer husband and wife team - but then she turned on him. How many lives did she take before she was caught? S1, Ep9
Denise Williams. When Mike Williams left to go hunting one morning, he didn't know he was leaving forever. It would take nearly 20 years to find the killer: his wife, Denise. S1, Ep10
Night Caller. In 2015, 33-year-old Jonathan Cherol is shot dead in his garden. CCTV footage sends detectives on the hunt for a strange woman and a mysterious vehicle. S9, Ep9
The Man In The Cowboy Hat. In 2016, a motel cleaner finds the body of an unidentified woman in one of the rooms. Detectives use CCTV to track a mysterious suspect in a cowboy hat. S9, Ep10

Signed in Blood. Explores how handwriting analysts now play an important role in profiling criminals and verifying the authenticity of suicide notes. S1, Ep13
Trial of the Century. The OJ Simpson murder trial captured the attention of the nation. Find out what forensics could and couldn't tell us about the trial of the century. S1, Ep15
A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep16
FBI Files. A closer look at real FBI cases with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep18
Wesley Neailey/Katelyn Parker. An 11-year-old boy goes missing near his home in Newcastle. Plus, a vulnerable young woman puts her trust in the wrong man. S4, Ep8
Hell's Angel. When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance leaves a trail of death and devastation. S2, Ep9
Lee Cutler: A Lost Soul. Lee disappeared one morning after leaving a friend. Had he gone into the wilds, or maybe joined the Israeli army? Follow the hunt for this troubled teen. S1, Ep1
The Long Walk Home. 24-year-old Nathan Trapuzzano is shot dead during his morning walk, leaving his pregnant wife a widow. Can CCTV help police track down the killer? S3, Ep10
Nurse, Thief, Womaniser... Killer. Malcolm Webster killed his wife through a staged car crash and later used his job as a nurse to kill more. Experts analyse his heinous crimes. S2, Ep1
Second Chance. A Utah family is torn apart after a disgruntled ex-husband, unable to move on, comes looking for revenge on his former wife after she gets remarried. S6, Ep1
Unmasked. In Knoxville, Tennessee, a seemingly perfect couple were secretly living a nightmare. The wife was found guilty of soliciting her new partner to kill her former husband. S6, Ep3
Tape The Scene. An 82-year-old woman is found murdered in her garage in Wisconsin. A city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria. S2, Ep3
Alice Ruggles. After Alice Ruggles ends their romantic relationship, her ex-boyfriend Harry Dhillon's refusal to let go turns sinister. S4, Ep6
View To A Rampage. A couple, just engaged, is found brutally murdered in a car. A surveillance camera gives the investigation its first break - a killer bent on revenge. S1, Ep5
A young couple go camping in Idaho, until their two-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators work tirelessly to find him, and the parents become suspects.
I Will Kill. Amber vanishes on Friday the 13th. A year later, Chelsea disappears. A survivor links the cases as police race to stop a hidden predator. S1, Ep2
